verification.summary: All 16 dossier facts are supported by the supplied material; none are contradicted and none are unverifiable against it. Every quoted number was checked digit-for-digit: the 25,400,000 ada / 25400000000000 lovelace ask is consistent across the action metadata, the anchor's onChain.gov_action.rewards, and the Budget Summary (whose three work packages sum exactly to the total); the recipient stake address in the anchor's tooling section is the same address that receives the on-chain reward; and the recipient-history, DRep-ballot, and 36-epoch treasury-flow figures reproduce the on-chain context block verbatim. The two doctrine facts are accurate restatements of values_hierarchy.md and the Dossier Gate Posture section of treasury_spending_doctrine.md. No invented figures, names, dates, or commitments were found — the audit surfaces no material discrepancies. Two non-material observations for the drafter, neither affecting a verdict: fact 5 abbreviates WP2's label by dropping '(including core Cardano repos)', and fact 7 correctly carries the anchor's hedged 'may include' for the Appold review scope rather than stating it as a firm commitment.
